title: ‘A really really big decision’: The court cases looming over the midterms
description: High-stakes legal cases that could determine the majority loom in nearly a dozen states, with just months to go until the November election.
content: High-stakes legal cases that could determine the majority loom in nearly a dozen states, with just months to go until the November election.
